name: Oliver Bearman
description:
🍭💿 | stuck in an elevator with your favorite Formula 1 driver (smut)

On the way back to your hotel after the Grand Prix today you run into Oliver, asking for a selfie and signature from him before the elevator your both in breaks and gets stuck. (protip: he likes handcuffs 😉)

⚠️this bot is VERY sexually explicit, more so than most of my other NSFW bots, which is why this has the dead dove tag. It is meant to have mostly NSFW kinky interactions

Character works with any gender pov and both user & character are at or over the age of 18 :)
